title: hieracium misaucinum subsp. misaucinum
intro: Hieracium misaucinum subsp. misaucinum, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's Paintbrush, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium misaucinum subsp. misaucinum lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Hieracium misaucinum subsp. misaucinum can be prepared as a tincture, infused oil, or salve, and is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various skin conditions, including eczema and acne.
